spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates autocorrect='on' vs 'off' inheritance and direct HTMLElement.autocorrect IDL reads on a real nested DOM tree.

interactive.rationale: Form, section, input, and textarea controls update explicit attributes while the live fields remain typeable.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature-index blurb matches the inheritance controls and live field behaviour.

edge_cases.rationale: The visual tree is backed by a real nested form/section/input DOM tree, and every node displays the direct element.autocorrect IDL read alongside the explicit content attribute.

references.rationale: Includes a see-also section with the canonical chromestatus.com/feature/6264645053710336 link.

design_system.rationale: Uses CSS variables throughout, with button colours and contrast aligned to the shared design system.

summary: Toggles at form/section/input with effective-value indicators, live inputs, and direct element.autocorrect IDL reads from the real nested DOM. The page embeds the canonical ChromeStatus link. Verified with chrome-devtools-mcp: form/input toggles updated real attributes, 5 IDL rows rendered fallback 'not exposed' state in the tested Canary, and console/network were clean.
